issues.description: Manual selection with empty selectedPosts falls through to automatic query instead of rendering no carousel. Spec says 'If query returns results but postsSource=manual with no selectedPosts, swiper-parent is not rendered.' Currently, when postsSource is 'manual' and selectedPosts is empty, the PHP else branch runs an automatic query, displaying blog posts. The condition at line 56 checks `$postsSource === 'manual' && ! empty( $selectedPosts )`, so an empty selectedPosts array falls through to the else (automatic) branch.
issues.fix: Add a separate condition for manual mode with empty selectedPosts. When postsSource is 'manual' and selectedPosts is empty, skip the WP_Query entirely and set $has_posts to false. For example: add `elseif ( $postsSource === 'manual' && empty( $selectedPosts ) ) { $has_posts = false; }` before the else branch, or restructure the conditional so that the automatic query only runs when postsSource is 'automatic'.

issues.description: The 'empty-optional' variation (section index 6, no heading/eyebrow/description) renders with 6 posts instead of the specified postsLimit of 6. The block correctly renders cards, but without any heading content the section has no aria-labelledby attribute and no visual heading to identify the section's purpose. While this is technically by-design (ThemeHeading handles its own empty state), it may confuse users. More importantly, this section's lack of section identification (no heading, no aria-label) means assistive technology users will encounter an unlabelled section.
issues.fix: Consider adding a fallback aria-label on the section when no heading is provided, or accept this as by-design since the ThemeHeading internally handles its own empty state. The priority fix is FQA-001.

issues.description: CRLF line endings in DynamicContentCarousel.tsx and index.tsx. Auto-fixable with bun run lint:fix.
Prettier formatting issue on line 55 of DynamicContentCarousel.tsx -- function signature should be multiline. Auto-fixable.

passedChecks: Build compiles without errors (only pre-existing asset size warnings)
Block registers correctly with apiVersion 3, name takt/dynamic-content-carousel
All 17 attributes defined in block.json with correct types and defaults matching spec
All required files exist: block.json, index.tsx, DynamicContentCarousel.tsx, .php, .js, .svg, resources/ArrowLeft.svg, resources/ArrowRight.svg
10 block instances on test page covering all specified variations
Post type queries work: post (5 results), team_member (3 results), resource (3 results), policy (3 results)
Navigation buttons have aria-label and title attributes with translatable strings (Previous Item / Next Item)
Section elements get automatic aria-labelledby from theme_block_props() when heading attribute is present
Swiper notification element uses sr-only class for screen readers
Controls row correctly hidden when both showPagination and showNavigation are false (section 9)
Data attributes on swiper container correctly reflect block attributes (data-navigation, data-pagination, data-loop, data-autoplay, data-autoplay-delay)
No markup duplication detected -- block does not duplicate content for responsive breakpoints
TSX/PHP sync verified: section classes, container classes, ThemeHeading props, and swiper-parent structure all match
TSX and JS Swiper configs are in sync (modules, breakpoints, spaceBetween, navigation selectors, pagination type)
Loop and autoplay correctly disabled in editor when block is selected (isSelected guard)
wp_reset_postdata() called after the query loop
Taxonomy filters correctly mapped per post type matching Archive block configuration
card template parts loaded dynamically based on post type (get_template_part('parts/card', $card_slug))
Progress bar uses accent gradient via --gradient-left/--gradient-right CSS variables
Navigation buttons use carousel-nav-btn class with hover gradient animation from swiper.css
Global focus-visible style provides keyboard focus indicator (outline-2 outline-black outline-dotted)
notes: The 'manual-selection' test variation has empty selectedPosts by design (needs editor population), but the fallback to automatic query is a spec violation (FQA-001)

All images in blog cards have empty alt attributes -- this is coming from the card templates (card-post.php), not this block. The card templates use featured images which should have alt text set per-image in the media library. This is a content concern, not a block code concern.

No prefers-reduced-motion handling found anywhere in the codebase for Swiper animations. This is a global/shared concern, not specific to this block, as CardsCarousel and GalleryCarousel also lack it.

The carousel-nav-btn hover state sets text-charcoal without a dark: variant. Since the gradient ::before fills the background with accent colors on hover, charcoal text should be readable against typical accent gradients. This is an existing pattern from CardsCarousel/swiper.css, not introduced by this block.
